feed.title: [Research] Bitcoin After Block Rewards : preventing miner's deviation when the Bitcoin rewards is zero

entry.title: [Research] Bitcoin After Block Rewards : preventing miner's deviation when the Bitcoin rewards is zero
entry.summary: The feedback provided on the paper was considered overly lengthy and verbose, attributed to AI-generated content. This verbosity has made it challenging for the recipient to engage with the feedback effectively. Simplification of the comments would enhance readability and usefulness, making it more accessible for the reader to understand and apply the suggestions. The feedback's current format resembles typical AI-generated advice, which might not align well with the needs for concise and targeted guidance.
